Day by Day
Saturday, June 27
Stamps Day · 3 Stops
5:39 AM
✈
Land at ORD · Pick Up Rental Car
Pick up rental car at airport. Drive ~45 min to hotel — early morning, light traffic.
6:30 AM
🏨
Drop Bags at Hotel (optional)
Early check-in unlikely — drop bags and freshen up in lobby, or just leave luggage in the trunk and head straight to pick up Michael.
6:45 AM
🚗
Pick Up Michael
Drive to pick up Michael in Hermosa/West Humboldt Park (~20 min from downtown). Allow ~1 hour total for driving and pickup.
7:30 AM
🍳
Breakfast — Lou Mitchell's
565 W Jackson Blvd · Opens 8 AM · Classic Chicago institution since 1923.
9:30 AM
🚗
Drive to Pullman
~30 min south on I-94 from downtown Chicago.
10:00 AM
◈
Pullman National Historical Park
610 E 111th St · Open Wed–Sun, 10 AM–4 PM · Free · Fully wheelchair accessible
◈ Pullman NHP ◈ Emmett Till & Mamie Till-Mobley NM ⚠ Call (773) 928-7257 to confirm open
⏱ Allow ~1.5 hrs
11:30 AM
🍕
Deep Dish Lunch — Lou Malnati's or Giordano's
South Loop location is perfectly on the way — grab deep dish before heading east to Indiana. Lou Malnati's South Loop: 805 S State St. Giordano's South Loop: 130 E Randolph St. Deep dish takes ~45 min to bake, so order as soon as you sit down.
⏱ Allow ~1.5 hrs including drive from Pullman (~20 min)
1:15 PM
🚗
Drive to Indiana Dunes
~45 min east on I-90 from the South Loop — straight shot, no backtracking.
2:00 PM
◈
Indiana Dunes National Park
1100 N Mineral Springs Rd, Porter, IN · Visitor Center open daily 8 AM–6 PM · America the Beautiful pass covers entry
◈ Indiana Dunes NP ⚠ Stamp station inside Visitor Center
⏱ Allow ~1.5 hrs · walk to the beach
3:30 PM
🚗
Drive to Chinatown
~55 min west on I-90/94 — Chinatown is right on the way back into the city from the Dunes.
4:30 PM
🍜
Early Dinner — Noodleverse 面八方
2002 S Wentworth Ave, Unit FC7, Chinatown · Authentic Chinese noodles · 4.5 ★ · $10–20/person · Closes 8 PM
⏱ Allow ~1 hr
5:30 PM
🚗
Drop Off Michael
~20 min northwest to Hermosa/West Humboldt Park.
6:00 PM
🏨
Hotel · Check In + Rest
~15 min back downtown. Room should be ready. Shower and rest — you've been up since yesterday.
Sunday, June 28
Chicago Day · Flight Home
8:30 AM
🚗
Pick Up Michael in Hermosa
~20 min northwest to Hermosa/West Humboldt Park. Allow ~45 min total for driving and pickup.
9:15 AM
🍳
Breakfast — [TBD]
Ask Michael for a recommendation near his neighborhood or on the way downtown.
10:00 AM
⛵
Chicago Architecture Center River Cruise
112 E Wacker Dr at Michigan Ave · 90-min narrated cruise · Voted #1 boat tour in the US (USA Today) · Fully seated, open-air upper deck
⚠ Book in advance at architecture.org ⚠ Arrive by 10:00 AM for 10:30 departure
⏱ 90 min cruise
12:00 PM
🫘
Millennium Park — Cloud Gate (The Bean)
201 E Randolph St · Free, open 6 AM–11 PM · 5-min walk from cruise dock · All entrances have ramps
⚠ Lurie Garden closed through early July 2026
⏱ Allow ~1 hr
1:00 PM
🍽
Lunch — Eataly Chicago
43 E Ohio St, Streeterville · Italian food hall, easy for a group · Keep it relatively quick.
3:00 PM
🦕
Head to the Field Museum
1400 S Lake Shore Dr · 10-min drive · Allow time for parking
3:30 PM
🎫
Pokémon Fossil Exhibit — Field Museum
Timed entry confirmed at 3:30 PM · Sue the T. rex and other specimens on the same floor
⚠ Confirmed reservation — do not be late!
⏱ Allow ~2 hrs
5:30 PM
🚗
Drop Off Michael in Hermosa
~20 min northwest from the Field Museum to Hermosa/West Humboldt Park.
6:00 PM
🚗
Head to ORD
~30–35 min from Hermosa to ORD — drop rental car, check in, clear security.
7:00 PM
🍽
Dinner at ORD
Plenty of options past security — grab a bite before the flight.
9:00 PM
✈
AA 3054 Departs ORD
Arrives SFO ~midnight · Safe travels!

Reminders & Action Items
🎫 Book Architecture Cruise tickets in advance at architecture.org — pick a 10:30 AM Sunday departure. Arrive by 10:00 AM.
📞 Confirm Pullman is open — call (773) 928-7257 before Saturday.
🏨 Hotel TBD — Best Western Grant Park recommended (1100 S Michigan Ave, steps from Field Museum).
🚗 Michael's pickup — neighborhood TBD; 1-hour buffer built into Saturday morning.
🎫 Field Museum Pokémon exhibit — 3:30 PM Sunday. Already booked. Do not be late.
🌿 Lurie Garden (Millennium Park) closed through early July 2026. Cloud Gate & Crown Fountain open.
🏞 America the Beautiful pass covers Indiana Dunes entry. Pullman is free. Field Museum is not covered.
